scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint
scripts.format: prettier --write src package.json astro.config.mjs eslint.config.mjs jsx.d.ts pnpm-workspace.yaml prettier.config.mjs tsconfig.eslint.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src package.json astro.config.mjs eslint.config.mjs jsx.d.ts pnpm-workspace.yaml prettier.config.mjs tsconfig.eslint.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc
